name: Unsigned Driver Loaded In Windows Kernel
notes: This rule triggers when an unsigned driver is loaded in Kernel.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001843) Driver loaded
when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
TD_list: APPLY Unsigned Driver Loaded In Windows Kernel on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001843) Driver loaded
AND when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
RED_list: Event name: Unsigned Driver Has Been Loaded Into Windows Kernel
Event description: Unsigned Driver Has Been Loaded Into Windows Kernel
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
